## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `mvn test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Docs And Config

- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior or workflow changed
- [ ] Example env files updated if new config was introduced

## Reviewer Notes

- Key files or areas to review
- Known follow-ups or non-goals
